head: 0dc7780 2026-07-10 21:00:05 +0200
branches_note: Default branch is `dev` (0dc7780, 2026-07-10 21:00), one commit AHEAD of `main` (e74e2f3, 2026-07-10 20:39) — dev carries a Postgres-claim 18->17 fix not on main. Only two branches exist (dev, main); no night-fix feature branch is ahead of the audited default, so the ENG-2069 hazard does not apply here — dev IS the freshest ref.

E1-S1.note: six-tier tree, four thin binaries (`cmd/{api,triage,relay,sweep}/main.go`), env-only `internal/config/config.go` and the `/healthz`+`/readyz` cell-split (`internal/server/server.go` `Health`/`Ready` echo CELL_ID+CLUSTER_NAME) all exist and compile. Missing: the named DoD test `TestHealthzEchoesCellIdentity` is absent (only the store RLS test is in-tree; health/config handlers untested), and AC3 loud-fail-on-missing-env is NOT met — `config.Load` uses silent dev-convenience defaults (`getenv`/bare `os.Getenv`), never fatals.

E1-S2.note: the AGPL import-denylist IS present and enforced (`.golangci.yml` depguard `agpl-import-guard` denies `github.com/docmost` across `$all`). Missing: contracts CODEGEN is not wired — `gen/*.go` shapes are hand-authored (gen/doc.go: "Until the generator lands they are hand-authored"), and there is NO contracts drift gate (the only drift check, scripts/check-context-freshness.sh, guards the Coding-Standards copy, not the contract).

E1-S3.note: only the cell-contract seam exists — `internal/auth/auth.go` re-exports `libauth.Cell` and `LocalCell()` (CellFromEnv). The token `Middleware`/`Verifier` over identity JWKS, the per-request tenant GUC (`app.tenant`) injection, and `VerifyFresh` on high-privilege transitions are all ABSENT (the package doc explicitly defers them until a real caller lands).

E1-S4.note: fully implemented AND tested. `migrations/0001_baseline.sql` ships RLS ENABLED+FORCED, fail-closed on `current_setting('app.tenant')`, with uuidv7() PKs on `proposal`+`outbox`; `internal/store/postgres/postgres.go` is the advisory-locked embedded-migration applier; `postgres_test.go` `TestBaselineRLSFailsClosed` proves fail-closed + per-tenant isolation against a REAL testcontainers Postgres 18 as a non-superuser role, and CI asserts it ran (not skipped).

E1-S5.note: the transactional `outbox` table (event_type/payload/published_at + unpublished index) is in the baseline migration and `cmd/relay` boots a poll-loop skeleton with a health split. Missing: the drain/publish itself is a TODO (relay logs "publish TODO"), `internal/event` is a doc-only stub, and there is NO spine consumer and NO OTel instrumentation.

E2-S1.note: `internal/intake` is a doc-only stub and `POST /v1/proposals` returns the typed 501 `not_implemented` sentinel. No submit operations, DfM/PM validation, base-version stamp, or receipt logic.

E2-S2.note: `internal/lifecycle` is a doc-only stub; the `proposal` table carries only id/tenant/state columns and no ChangeSet table or state-machine transitions exist.

E2-S3.note: provenance/attribution is not implemented — no provenance table, no two-sided immutable record keyed on verified principal.

E2-S4.note: pointer-state S3 payloads are not implemented — S3 config fields exist in `internal/config` but there is no client, no tenant-keyed body write, and no sha256-in-queue-row.

E2-S5.note: `internal/quota` is a doc-only stub — no in-flight caps, no 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED, no depth/age alerting.

E3-S1.note: `internal/triage` is a doc-only stub and `cmd/triage` is a health-only skeleton (drain loop TODO). No disposition production.

E3-S2.note: `internal/routing` is a doc-only stub — no find-before-create dedup, duplicate-of, or divert-to-workgraph routing.

E3-S3.note: hard conflict detection is not implemented — no authoritative read, anchor re-resolution, or no-auto-merge guard.

E4-S1.note: `internal/policy` is a doc-only stub — no Autonomy Dial server-side policy verdict.

E4-S2.note: trust tiers are not implemented — no per-producer acceptance history or auto-apply gating.

E4-S3.note: review queue is not implemented — `GET /v1/changesets/{id}` and `POST /v1/changesets/{id}/decide` return typed 501; no bulk-decide, buckets, or adjudication lane.

E5-S1.note: `internal/apply` is a doc-only stub; `apply` and `internalApplyStep` routes return typed 501. No wiki-api CAS writes, receipts, pause/rollback, or step-APIs.

E5-S2.note: `internal/beautify` is a doc-only stub — no triage-time re-author, mechanical done-bar, or sha256 artifact.

E5-S3.note: scheduled publishing is not implemented — `internalPublishScheduled` returns typed 501; no UTC-instant+tzid, cancel, or conflict re-run.

E6-S1.note: `internal/learning` is a doc-only stub — no append-only feedback events.

E6-S2.note: learning application/transparency is not implemented — no exemplars, tiers, held-out harness, or changelog.

E6-S3.note: cold-start defaults are not implemented — no baseline pack, dial recommendation, or content-free exemplars.

E6-S4.note: prompt-pack marketplace is not implemented — no publish/install/rate or admin-approval flow.

E7-S1.note: `internal/sweep` is a doc-only stub, `cmd/sweep` is a health-only skeleton, and `internalSweepDispatch` returns typed 501. No sweep executor or duplicate/merge sweep.

E7-S2.note: staleness & verification queue + retrieval trust-gating contract are not implemented.

E7-S3.note: structure & link-hygiene sweep is not implemented — no orphan/broken-link/misfiled/IA detection.

E7-S4.note: beautification sweep is not implemented — no mechanical-bar flagging or proposed diffs.

E7-S5.note: AI-groundability flag + review-state gate are not implemented — no page-meta write via wiki-api.

E8-S1.note: MCP staging section lives outside this repo (the MCP server is a separate service); nothing here. No staging_* tools present in this tree.

E8-S2.note: CLI staging section lives in orvex-cli (separate repo); nothing here.

E8-S3.note: the `outbox` table can carry `studio.staging.<resource>.<past-tense>` types, but NO events are ever emitted (relay drain is TODO) and there is no CloudEvents catalog; `internal/event` is a doc-only stub.

E8-S4.note: the hard-cut migration of agent wiki-write surfaces is not implemented — no loud-error redirection of legacy write paths.

E8-S5.note: curator supersession (Card v1 → Proposal verbatim mapping + goldens) is not implemented.

E9-S1.note: the 100-Proposal load benchmark / SLO release gate does not exist — no benchmark harness in-tree.

E9-S2.note: the per-tenant ISOLATION floor is present and proven (RLS fail-closed baseline + `TestBaselineRLSFailsClosed`). Missing: the apply-rate throttle, per-tenant fairness scheduler, and immutable audit journal named by this story are all ABSENT.

E9-S3.note: no six-surface E2E and no fresh-tenant real-data pass exist; the only isolation probe in-tree is the DB-level store RLS test (E1-S4), not the P8 cross-surface suite.

summary: orvex-studio-staging is an honest, well-documented SCAFFOLD, not a delivered service: 1 story present, 5 partial, 30 absent of 36. Only the Postgres RLS store baseline (E1-S4) is fully implemented and tested (real testcontainers PG18, fail-closed isolation proven + CI-gated); the six-tier skeleton, AGPL denylist, cell-auth seam, and outbox table are partials, and every domain tier (intake/lifecycle/triage/routing/policy/apply/beautify/learning/sweep/event) is a doc-only stub whose routes return typed 501 not_implemented sentinels. No fabricated done: the code openly labels its TODOs and returns honest closed doors.
